creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Good day.

Tue, Nov 11, 2008 at 10:28:18AM +0000, garga@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [vuxml] VBA parser vulnerability in ClamAV < 0.94.1
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: garga
> State-Changed-When: Tue Nov 11 10:28:18 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Already committed, just closing now. Thanks for contributing!!

I think I should take my pointy hat: VuXML entry should read
-----
reported by Moritz Jodeit <moritz*jodeit.org>
-----
instead of
-----
reported by Moritz Jodeit >moritz*jodeit.org<
-----
i.e. > and < should be exchanged.

Sorry for the confusion!
-- 
Eygene

 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual   
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
